title: cyclosorus acuminatus
intro: Cyclosorus acuminatus, also known as the fan-leaved lip fern, is a species of fern native to Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus acuminatus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Cyclosorus acuminatus is often prepared as a tea or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
